<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="id">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>AwareMind Indonesia — Stop Scrolling, Start Growing</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

  <script>
    tailwind.config = {
      theme: {
        extend: {
          colors: {
            primary:   { DEFAULT: '#2B7FFF', light: '#69AEFF', dark: '#1A5FCC' },
            teal:      { DEFAULT: '#6B3FD4', light: '#9B72F0', dark: '#4F2BA8' },
            yellow:    { DEFAULT: '#FBBF24', light: '#FDE68A', dark: '#D97706' },
            midnight:  { DEFAULT: '#0F172A', soft: '#1E293B' },
            fog:       '#F4F0FF',
          },
          fontFamily: {
            display: ['Poppins', 'sans-serif'],
            body:    ['Poppins', 'sans-serif'],
          },
          animation: {
            'float':      'float 6s ease-in-out infinite',
            'fade-up':    'fadeUp .7s ease forwards',
            'pulse-slow': 'pulse 4s ease-in-out infinite',
          },
          keyframes: {
            float:   { '0%,100%':{ transform:'translateY(0)' }, '50%':{ transform:'translateY(-14px)' } },
            fadeUp:  { from:{ opacity:'0', transform:'translateY(30px)' }, to:{ opacity:'1', transform:'translateY(0)' } },
          }
        }
      }
    }
  </script>

  <style>
    /* ── CSS Variables ───────────────────────────────── */
    :root {
      --c-primary:  #2B7FFF;
      --c-teal:     #6B3FD4;
      --c-yellow:   #FBBF24;
      --c-midnight: #0F172A;
      --c-fog:      #F4F0FF;
    }

    * { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    body { font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif; background:#fff; color:#0F172A; overflow-x:hidden; }

    /* ── Noise overlay ───────────────────────────────── */
    .noise::after {
      content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none;
      background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
      opacity:.04;
    }

    /* ── Mesh gradient hero ──────────────────────────── */
    .hero-bg {
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 15% 20%, rgba(43,127,255,.20) 0%, transparent 55%),
                  radial-gradient(ellipse at 85% 15%, rgba(107,63,212,.16) 0%, transparent 50%),
                  radial-gradient(ellipse at 55% 85%, rgba(0,198,255,.10) 0%, transparent 50%),
                  #F4F0FF;
    }

    /* ── Section headers ─────────────────────────────── */
    .section-tag {
      display:inline-block; font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif; font-size:.72rem;
      font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.12em; text-transform:uppercase;
      padding:.3rem .9rem; border-radius:999px; margin-bottom:1rem;
    }

    /* ── Card hover lift ─────────────────────────────── */
    .card-lift { transition: transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease; }
    .card-lift:hover { transform:translateY(-6px); box-shadow:0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.1); }

    /* ── Timeline ────────────────────────────────────── */
    .timeline-dot {
      width:18px; height:18px; border-radius:50%;
      background:var(--c-yellow); border:3px solid var(--c-primary);
      flex-shrink:0; margin-top:4px;
    }

    /* ── Tabs ────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .tab-btn.active { background:var(--c-primary); color:#fff; }

    /* ── Masonry gallery ─────────────────────────────── */
    .masonry {
      columns: 2; column-gap:12px;
    }
    @media(min-width:768px){ .masonry{ columns:3; } }
    @media(min-width:1024px){ .masonry{ columns:4; } }
    .masonry-item { break-inside:avoid; margin-bottom:12px; }

    /* ── Speech bubble ───────────────────────────────── */
    .bubble {
      position:relative; background:#fff; border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;
      box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(37,99,235,.12);
    }
    .bubble::after {
      content:''; position:absolute; bottom:-14px; left:24px;
      border:7px solid transparent; border-top-color:#fff;
      border-bottom:none;
    }

    /* ── Scroll reveal ───────────────────────────────── */
    .reveal { opacity:0; transform:translateY(28px); transition:opacity .65s ease, transform .65s ease; }
    .reveal.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }

    /* ── Org chart ───────────────────────────────────── */
    .org-connector {
      position:absolute; top:100%; left:50%;
      transform:translateX(-50%);
      width:2px; height:32px;
      background:rgba(37,99,235,.3);
    }
    .org-h-line {
      position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0;
      height:2px; background:rgba(37,99,235,.3);
    }

    /* ── Navbar ──────────────────────────────────────── */
    #navbar { transition:background .3s, box-shadow .3s; }
    #navbar.scrolled { background:rgba(255,255,255,.9); backdrop-filter:blur(12px); box-shadow:0 1px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.08); }

    /* ── Gradient text ───────────────────────────────── */
    .gradient-text {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2B7FFF 0%, #6B3FD4 60%, #A855F7 100%);
      -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text;
    }

    /* ── Blob decoration ─────────────────────────────── */
    .blob {
      border-radius:60% 40% 30% 70% / 60% 30% 70% 40%;
      animation: blob-morph 8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes blob-morph {
      0%,100%{ border-radius:60% 40% 30% 70% / 60% 30% 70% 40%; }
      50%{ border-radius:30% 60% 70% 40% / 50% 60% 30% 60%; }
    }

    /* ── Custom scrollbar ────────────────────────────── */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar{ width:6px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{ background:#f1f5f9; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{ background:var(--c-primary); border-radius:3px; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     NAVBAR
════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<nav id="navbar" class="fixed top-0 inset-x-0 z-50 py-3 px-4 md:px-8">
  <div class="max-w-6xl mx-auto flex items-center justify-between">

    <!-- Logo -->
    <a href="#hero" class="flex items-center gap-3 group">
      <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden shadow-md">
        <!-- Placeholder: swap <img> below with your actual logo src -->
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="AwareMind Logo" class="w-full h-full object-cover p-1" />
      </div>
      <span class="font-display font-800 text-lg text-midnight tracking-tight">
        aware<span style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#2B7FFF,#6B3FD4);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text">mind</span>
      </span>
    </a>

    <!-- Desktop links -->
    <ul class="hidden md:flex items-center gap-6 text-sm font-medium text-slate-600">
      <li><a href="#about"   class="hover:text-primary transition">Tentang Kami</a></li>
      <li><a href="#visi"    class="hover:text-primary transition">Visi & Misi</a></li>
      <li><a href="#story"   class="hover:text-primary transition">Sejarah</a></li>
      <li><a href="#team"    class="hover:text-primary transition">Tim</a></li>
      <li><a href="#gallery" class="hover:text-primary transition">Galeri</a></li>
      <li><a href="#program" class="hover:text-primary transition">Program</a></li>
      <li><a href="#contact" class="hover:text-primary transition">Kontak</a></li>
    </ul>

    <!-- CTA -->
    <a href="https://bit.ly/AMTbatch1" target="_blank"
       class="hidden md:inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-primary hover:bg-primary-dark text-white text-sm font-semibold px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full transition shadow-lg shadow-blue-200">
      Join Kami ✦
    </a>

    <!-- Hamburger -->
    <button id="menuBtn" class="md:hidden w-9 h-9 flex flex-col justify-center items-center gap-1.5">
      <span class="block w-5 h-0.5 bg-midnight rounded transition"></span>
      <span class="block w-5 h-0.5 bg-midnight rounded transition"></span>
      <span class="block w-3.5 h-0.5 bg-midnight rounded transition"></span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile menu -->
  <div id="mobileMenu" class="hidden md:hidden bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl mt-2 py-4 px-6 mx-4 flex flex-col gap-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700">
    <a href="#about"   class="hover:text-primary" onclick="closeMobile()">Tentang Kami</a>
    <a href="#visi"    class="hover:text-primary" onclick="closeMobile()">Visi & Misi</a>
    <a href="#story"   class="hover:text-primary" onclick="closeMobile()">Sejarah</a>
    <a href="#team"    class="hover:text-primary" onclick="closeMobile()">Tim</a>
    <a href="#gallery" class="hover:text-primary" onclick="closeMobile()">Galeri</a>
    <a href="#program" class="hover:text-primary" onclick="closeMobile()">Program</a>
    <a href="#contact" class="hover:text-primary" onclick="closeMobile()">Kontak</a>
    <a href="https://bit.ly/AMTbatch1" target="_blank"
       class="mt-1 text-center bg-primary text-white py-2.5 rounded-full font-semibold">
      Join Kami ✦
    </a>
  </div>
</nav>


<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     HERO
════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="hero" class="hero-bg noise relative min-h-screen flex items-center overflow-hidden pt-20">

  <!-- Decorative blobs -->
  <div class="blob absolute -top-24 -right-24 w-80 h-80 bg-blue-100 opacity-40 -z-0"></div>
  <div class="blob absolute bottom-10 -left-20 w-64 h-64 bg-purple-100 opacity-40 -z-0"></div>
  <div class="blob absolute top-1/2 right-1/4 w-40 h-40 bg-yellow-100 opacity-60 -z-0"></div>

  <div class="max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 md:px-8 w-full relative z-10">
    <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-10 items-center">

      <!-- Text -->
      <div class="text-center md:text-left">
        <!-- badge -->
        <span class="section-tag bg-blue-100 text-primary mb-4">#NoMoreBrainRot</span>

        <h1 class="font-display text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-extrabold leading-tight mb-5">
          <span class="gradient-text">AwareMind</span><br/>
          <span class="text-midnight">Indonesia.</span>
        </h1>

        <p class="text-slate-600 text-lg md:text-xl leading-relaxed mb-8 max-w-lg mx-auto md:mx-0">
          Mari pulih dari adiksi digital, temukan fokusmu kembali, dan optimalkan
          potensi maksimalmu bersama kami.
        </p>

        <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 justify-center md:justify-start">
          <a href="https://bit.ly/AMTbatch1" target="_blank"
             class="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-primary hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-2xl shadow-lg shadow-blue-300 transition hover:scale-105 active:scale-95">
            Mulai Bertumbuh 🚀
          </a>
          <a href="#about"
             class="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-2xl transition">
            Kenali Kami →
          </a>
        </div>

        <!-- Stats row -->
        <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-6 mt-10 justify-center md:justify-start">
          <div class="text-center">
            <p class="font-display font-extrabold text-2xl text-primary">Batch 1</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5">AMT 2026</p>
          </div>
          <div class="w-px bg-slate-200"></div>
          <div class="text-center">
            <p class="font-display font-extrabold text-2xl text-purple-600">6+</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5">Divisi Aktif</p>
          </div>
          <div class="w-px bg-slate-200"></div>
          <div class="text-center">
            <p class="font-display font-extrabold text-2xl text-yellow-500">3 Bulan</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5">Akselerasi</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Mascot / illustration -->
      <div class="flex justify-center relative">
        <div class="relative w-72 h-72 md:w-96 md:h-96">
          <!-- Glow ring -->
          <div class="absolute inset-0 rounded-full animate-pulse-slow" style="background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(43,127,255,0.20) 0%, rgba(107,63,212,0.12) 60%, transparent 80%)"></div>
          <!-- Mascot image — using the uploaded brain+cap logo as Mindy -->
          <img
            src="data:image/png;base64,"
            alt="Mindy Maskot AwareMind"
            class="relative z-10 w-full h-full object-contain animate-float" style="filter:drop-shadow(0 8px 24px rgba(43,127,255,0.35))"
            
          />
          <!-- Badge floating -->
          <div class="absolute -bottom-4 -right-4 bg-yellow font-display font-bold text-midnight text-sm px-4 py-2 rounded-xl shadow-lg rotate-3">
            💡 Let's Grow!
          </div>
          <div class="absolute top-4 -left-4 bg-white font-medium text-purple-600 text-xs px-3 py-2 rounded-xl shadow-md -rotate-2">
            🧠 Mental Health First
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Wave divider -->
  <div class="absolute bottom-0 inset-x-0">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 80" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" preserveAspectRatio="none">
      <path d="M0,64L60,58.7C120,53,240,43,360,48C480,53,600,75,720,74.7C840,75,960,53,1080,48C1200,43,1320,53,1380,58.7L1440,64L1440,80L0,80Z" fill="white"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     ABOUT US
════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="about" class="py-24 bg-white">
  <div class="max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 md:px-8">
    <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center">

      <!-- Visual side -->
      <div class="reveal order-2 md:order-1">
        <div class="relative">
          <div class="w-full aspect-square max-w-md mx-auto rounded-3xl overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-teal-50 flex items-center justify-center p-8 shadow-xl">
            <!-- Placeholder logo area -->
            <div class="text-center">
              <div class="w-48 h-48 mx-auto rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-purple-600 flex items-center justify-center shadow-2xl mb-4">
                <span class="font-display font-extrabold text-7xl text-white">A</span>
              </div>
              <p class="font-display font-bold text-xl text-midnight">AwareMind Indonesia</p>
              <p class="text-purple-600 text-sm mt-1">@awaremind.id</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Floating cards -->
          <div class="absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-yellow font-display font-bold text-midnight text-xs px-4 py-2 rounded-xl shadow rotate-3">
            Safe Space 🤝
          </div>
          <div class="absolute -bottom-4 -left-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-600 text-white font-semibold text-xs px-4 py-2 rounded-xl shadow -rotate-2">
            Ruang Bertumbuh 🌱
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Text -->
      <div class="reveal order-1 md:order-2">
        <span class="section-tag bg-purple-100 text-purple-600">Tentang Kami</span>
        <h2 class="font-display font-extrabold text-4xl md:text-5xl text-midnight leading-tight mb-6">
          Siapa Kami?
        </h2>
        <p class="text-slate-600 text-lg leading-relaxed mb-5">
          <strong class="text-primary">AwareMind Indonesia</strong> adalah <em>safe space</em> sekaligus ruang bertumbuh
          bagi pemuda untuk pulih dari adiksi digital dan mengoptimalkan potensinya.
        </p>
        <p class="text-slate-600 leading-relaxed mb-5">
          Mimpi kami adalah mencetak generasi yang sehat secara mental dan berdaya juang tinggi.
          Kami hadir menemanimu berproses — mulai dari memulihkan daya fokusmu,
          menyediakan pendampingan psikologis sebaya yang empatik, memfasilitasi refleksi,
          hingga mendampingimu menembus batas pendidikan lewat literasi beasiswa.
        </p>
        <p class="text-slate-600 leading-relaxed mb-8">
          Di AwareMind, kamu akan diberdayakan dari sekadar konsumen pasif menjadi
          penggerak yang menebar manfaat nyata. <strong class="text-purple-600">Mari pulih, bertumbuh, dan berdampak bersama!</strong>
        </p>
        <a href="#contact"
           class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-purple-600 text-white font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl hover:bg-purple-700 transition shadow-lg shadow-purple-100">
          Hubungi Kami →
        </a>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     VISI & MISI + E.I.S
════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="visi" class="py-24 bg-midnight relative overflow-hidden">
  <!-- background decoration -->
  <div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-5"
    style="background-image:radial-gradient(circle, #fff 1px, transparent 1px); background-size:40px 40px;"></div>

  <div class="max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 md:px-8 relative z-10">
    <div class="text-center mb-16 reveal">
      <span class="section-tag bg-blue-900 text-blue-300">Visi & Misi</span>
      <h2 class="font-display font-extrabold text-4xl md:text-5xl text-white mt-2 mb-4">Arah & Tujuan Kami</h2>
    </div>

    <!-- Visi card -->
    <div class="reveal bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-700 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 mb-12 text-white relative overflow-hidden shadow-2xl">
      <div class="absolute right-8 top-8 font-display font-extrabold text-9xl text-white opacity-5 select-none">V</div>
      <span class="inline-block bg-white/20 text-white text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-3 py-1 rounded-full mb-4">Visi</span>
      <p class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-medium leading-relaxed max-w-3xl">
        "Menjadi ruang bertumbuh bagi pemuda Indonesia untuk pulih dari adiksi digital,
        guna mencetak generasi yang <strong>sehat secara mental</strong>, berdaya juang tinggi,
        dan mampu mengoptimalkan potensi maksimalnya."
      </p>
    </div>

    <!-- Misi list -->
    <div class="reveal mb-16">
      <h3 class="font-display font-bold text-2xl text-white mb-6">Misi Kami</h3>
      <div class="grid sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
        <!-- misi items -->
        <div class="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-5 hover:bg-white/10 transition">
          <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-blue-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-3">
            <span class="text-xl">🧠</span>
          </div>
          <p class="text-slate-200 text-sm leading-relaxed">Menghadirkan psikoedukasi untuk membantu pemuda merebut kembali daya fokus mereka dari jeratan adiksi digital.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-5 hover:bg-white/10 transition">
          <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-purple-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-3">
            <span class="text-xl">🤝</span>
          </div>
          <p class="text-slate-200 text-sm leading-relaxed">Menciptakan <em>safe space</em> dan layanan pendampingan sebaya yang empatik, suportif, serta bebas dari penghakiman.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-5 hover:bg-white/10 transition">
          <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-yellow-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-3">
            <span class="text-xl">🌿</span>
          </div>
          <p class="text-slate-200 text-sm leading-relaxed">Menemani proses pengenalan dan regulasi diri pemuda melalui praktik refleksi yang menyeimbangkan psikologi modern dan spiritual.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-5 hover:bg-white/10 transition">
          <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-purple-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-3">
            <span class="text-xl">🎓</span>
          </div>
          <p class="text-slate-200 text-sm leading-relaxed">Mendampingi pemuda mengoptimalkan potensi dan mendobrak keterbatasan akses pendidikan melalui literasi beasiswa serta pengembangan skill.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-5 hover:bg-white/10 transition sm:col-span-2 lg:col-span-1">
          <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-rose-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-3">
            <span class="text-xl">🔥</span>
          </div>
          <p class="text-slate-200 text-sm leading-relaxed">Memberdayakan komunitas penggerak yang saling menguatkan untuk terjun langsung menebarkan manfaat dan kesadaran mental di tengah masyarakat.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- E.I.S Core Values -->
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="text-center mb-8">
        <h3 class="font-display font-bold text-2xl text-white">The E.I.S Core Values</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">

        <div class="bg-gradient-to-b from-blue-600 to-blue-800 rounded-3xl p-8 text-white text-center card-lift shadow-xl">
          <div class="font-display font-extrabold text-6xl mb-2 opacity-20">E</div>
          <div class="font-display font-extrabold text-3xl mb-3 -mt-8">EDUCATION</div>
          <p class="text-blue-100 text-sm leading-relaxed">Semua materi yang kita sampaikan harus punya landasan data ilmiah dan riset psikologi yang bisa dipertanggungjawabkan.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="bg-gradient-to-b from-purple-600 to-purple-900 rounded-3xl p-8 text-white text-center card-lift shadow-xl">
          <div class="font-display font-extrabold text-6xl mb-2 opacity-20">I</div>
          <div class="font-display font-extrabold text-3xl mb-3 -mt-8">INTERVENTION</div>
          <p class="text-purple-100 text-sm leading-relaxed">Kita nggak cuma jago teori. Kita turun ke lapangan, bawa solusi, dan ngasih dampak langsung yang kerasa manfaatnya.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="bg-gradient-to-b from-yellow-500 to-yellow-700 rounded-3xl p-8 text-midnight text-center card-lift shadow-xl">
          <div class="font-display font-extrabold text-6xl mb-2 opacity-20">S</div>
          <div class="font-display font-extrabold text-3xl mb-3 -mt-8">SPIRITUAL</div>
          <p class="text-yellow-900 text-sm leading-relaxed">Kita mengedepankan adab dan kebiasaan refleksi diri sebagai jangkar biar hati kita tetap tenang di tengah berisiknya dunia digital.</p>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>


<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SEJARAH — TIMELINE
════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="story" class="py-24 bg-fog relative overflow-hidden">
  <div class="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 md:px-8">
    <div class="text-center mb-16 reveal">
      <span class="section-tag bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700">Sejarah Kami</span>
      <h2 class="font-display font-extrabold text-4xl md:text-5xl text-midnight mt-2 mb-4">The Story Behind Us</h2>
      <p class="text-slate-500 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
        Berawal dari keresahan yang nyata tentang <em>Digital Brain Rot</em> yang menggerus fokus generasi muda Indonesia.
      </p>
    </div>

    <!-- Story intro card -->
    <div class="reveal bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-10 shadow-xl border border-blue-50 mb-12">
      <div class="flex items-start gap-4 mb-4">
        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-teal flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center text-white text-xl">💭</div>
        <div>
          <p class="font-display font-bold text-lg text-midnight mb-1">Tahukah kamu?</p>
          <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm">Fenomena yang menggerakkan kami hadir</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p class="text-slate-600 leading-relaxed text-base">
        Pernah nggak sih kamu niatnya buka HP cuma 5 menit, tapi tahu-tahu udah berjam-jam scrolling tanpa arah?
        Habis itu, badan terasa capek, pikiran kosong, dan anehnya kamu jadi makin susah buat fokus belajar.
        <strong class="text-primary">You are not alone.</strong> Rentang fokus kita sekarang sudah menyusut hingga tersisa
        <strong class="text-rose-500">8,25 detik</strong> saja. Rata-rata dari kita bisa menghabiskan
        <strong class="text-rose-500">6 jam sehari</strong> cuma untuk menatap layar.
        Inilah fenomena yang kita sebut <strong class="text-midnight">Digital Brain Rot.</strong>
      </p>
      <p class="text-slate-600 leading-relaxed text-base mt-4">
        Berangkat dari keresahan yang nyata inilah <strong class="text-primary">AwareMind Indonesia</strong> hadir.
        Kami nggak mau generasi kita hanya pasrah menjadi konsumen konten yang kehilangan arah.
        Kami hadir untuk mengajak kamu <strong class="text-purple-600">Reclaim Your Focus</strong>.
      </p>
    </div>

    <!-- Timeline -->
    <div class="relative">
      <!-- Vertical line -->
      <div class="absolute left-8 md:left-1/2 top-0 bottom-0 w-0.5 bg-gradient-to-b from-primary via-teal to-yellow-400 transform md:-translate-x-px"></div>

      <!-- Timeline items -->
      <div class="space-y-10">

        <!-- Item: placeholder 1 -->
        <div class="reveal flex flex-col md:flex-row items-start gap-4 md:gap-0">
          <div class="md:w-1/2 md:pr-12 md:text-right order-2 md:order-1 pl-16 md:pl-0">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-md border border-slate-100 card-lift">
              <span class="text-xs font-bold text-primary uppercase tracking-wider">Awal Mula</span>
              <h4 class="font-display font-bold text-lg text-midnight mt-1 mb-2">Keresahan yang Nyata</h4>
              <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                [Placeholder: Cerita awal terbentuknya AwareMind akan ditambahkan di sini. Tuliskan kisah inspiratif perjalanan awal organisasi.]
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="relative z-10 flex-shrink-0 order-1 md:order-2">
            <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-primary border-4 border-white shadow absolute left-5 md:left-auto md:relative md:mx-auto"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="md:w-1/2 md:pl-12 order-3 hidden md:block"></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Item: placeholder 2 -->
        <div class="reveal flex flex-col md:flex-row items-start gap-4 md:gap-0">
          <div class="md:w-1/2 md:pr-12 order-2 hidden md:block"></div>
          <div class="relative z-10 flex-shrink-0 order-1 md:order-2">
            <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-purple-600 border-4 border-white shadow absolute left-5 md:left-auto md:relative md:mx-auto"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="md:w-1/2 md:pl-12 order-3 md:order-3 pl-16 md:pl-12">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-md border border-slate-100 card-lift">
              <span class="text-xs font-bold text-purple-600 uppercase tracking-wider">Fondasi</span>
              <h4 class="font-display font-bold text-lg text-midnight mt-1 mb-2">Terbentuknya Visi Bersama</h4>
              <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                [Placeholder: Momen ketika visi dan misi AwareMind mulai dirumuskan bersama akan ditambahkan di sini.]
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Item: placeholder 3 -->
        <div class="reveal flex flex-col md:flex-row items-start gap-4 md:gap-0">
          <div class="md:w-1/2 md:pr-12 md:text-right order-2 md:order-1 pl-16 md:pl-0">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-md border border-slate-100 card-lift">
              <span class="text-xs font-bold text-yellow-600 uppercase tracking-wider">Peluncuran</span>
              <h4 class="font-display font-bold text-lg text-midnight mt-1 mb-2">AwareMind Indonesia Hadir</h4>
              <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                [Placeholder: Cerita peluncuran resmi AwareMind Indonesia dan program pertama yang dijalankan akan ditambahkan di sini.]
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="relative z-10 flex-shrink-0 order-1 md:order-2">
            <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-yellow-400 border-4 border-white shadow absolute left-5 md:left-auto md:relative md:mx-auto"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="md:w-1/2 md:pl-12 order-3 hidden md:block"></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Item: Batch 1 -->
        <div class="reveal flex flex-col md:flex-row items-start gap-4 md:gap-0">
          <div class="md:w-1/2 md:pr-12 order-2 hidden md:block"></div>
          <div class="relative z-10 flex-shrink-0 order-1 md:order-2">
            <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-rose-500 border-4 border-white shadow absolute left-5 md:left-auto md:relative md:mx-auto"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="md:w-1/2 md:pl-12 order-3 md:order-3 pl-16 md:pl-12">
            <div class="rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-xl text-white card-lift" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2B7FFF,#6B3FD4)">
              <span class="text-xs font-bold text-blue-200 uppercase tracking-wider">Sekarang — 2026</span>
              <h4 class="font-display font-bold text-lg text-white mt-1 mb-2">AwareMind Team Batch 1 🎉</h4>
              <p class="text-blue-100 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                Rekrutmen AMT Batch 1 dibuka! Akselerasi 3 bulan (Juni–Agustus 2026) untuk pemuda usia 15–25 tahun yang siap bertransformasi.
              </p>

          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PROGRAM
════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="program" class="py-24 bg-fog">
  <div class="max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 md:px-8">
    <div class="text-center mb-12 reveal">
      <span class="section-tag bg-purple-100 text-purple-600">Program Kami</span>
      <h2 class="font-display font-extrabold text-4xl md:text-5xl text-midnight mt-2 mb-4">Apa yang Kami Tawarkan</h2>
    </div>

    <!-- Tabs -->
    <div class="flex justify-center gap-2 mb-10 reveal">
      <button id="tab1" onclick="switchTab(1)" class="tab-btn active font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-sm border border-primary transition">
        🟢 Sedang Berjalan
      </button>
      <button id="tab2" onclick="switchTab(2)" class="tab-btn font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-sm border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-600 transition">
        ⏳ Coming Soon
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Tab 1: Active programs -->
    <div id="panel1" class="reveal">
      <div class="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">

        <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-md card-lift border border-slate-100">
          <div class="h-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-teal"></div>
          <div class="p-6">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
              <span class="bg-green-100 text-green-700 text-xs font-bold px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full">● AKTIF</span>
            </div>
            <div class="text-3xl mb-3">🧠</div>
            <h3 class="font-display font-bold text-lg text-midnight mb-2">AMT Batch 1 Recruitment</h3>
            <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm leading-relaxed mb-4">Rekrutmen AwareMind Team Batch 1 — akselerasi 3 bulan untuk pemuda yang siap bertransformasi menjadi penggerak.</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-primary font-semibold">🗓 9–16 Mei 2026</p>
            <a href="https://bit.ly/AMTbatch1" target="_blank"
               class="mt-4 w-full block text-center bg-primary text-white text-sm font-semibold py-2.5 rounded-xl hover:bg-blue-700 transition">
              Daftar Sekarang →
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-md card-lift border border-slate-100">
          <div class="h-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-blue-500"></div>
          <div class="p-6">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
              <span class="bg-green-100 text-green-700 text-xs font-bold px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full">● AKTIF</span>
            </div>
            <div class="text-3xl mb-3">💬</div>
            <h3 class="font-display font-bold text-lg text-midnight mb-2">HealMind Session</h3>
            <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm leading-relaxed mb-4">Layanan peer counseling & sharing session empatik dengan tenaga ahli untuk membahas isu psikologi secara mendalam.</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-primary font-semibold">🗓 Rutin Mingguan</p>
            <a href="#contact"
               class="mt-4 w-full block text-center bg-purple-600 text-white text-sm font-semibold py-2.5 rounded-xl hover:bg-purple-700 transition">
              Info Selengkapnya →
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-md card-lift border border-slate-100">
          <div class="h-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-400 to-orange-400"></div>
          <div class="p-6">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
              <span class="bg-green-100 text-green-700 text-xs font-bold px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full">● AKTIF</span>
            </div>
            <div class="text-3xl mb-3">📚</div>
            <h3 class="font-display font-bold text-lg text-midnight mb-2">Psikoedukasi Digital</h3>
            <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm leading-relaxed mb-4">Konten edukasi berbasis riset psikologi untuk membantu pemuda merebut kembali daya fokus dari jeratan adiksi digital.</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-primary font-semibold">🗓 @awaremind.id</p>
            <a href="https://instagram.com/awaremind.id" target="_blank"
               class="mt-4 w-full block text-center bg-yellow text-midnight text-sm font-semibold py-2.5 rounded-xl hover:bg-yellow-dark transition">
              Ikuti Kami →
            </a>
          </div>

      </div>

          </div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     FLOATING CTA
════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<a href="https://bit.ly/AMTbatch1" target="_blank"
   class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-primary hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-bold px-5 py-3.5 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl shadow-blue-300 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm transition hover:scale-105 active:scale-95">
  <span>🚀</span> Join AMT Batch 1
</a>


<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     JAVASCRIPT
════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<script>
  /* ── Navbar scroll ──────────── */
  const navbar = document.getElementById('navbar');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    navbar.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 30);
  });

  /* ── Hamburger menu ─────────── */
  const menuBtn  = document.getElementById('menuBtn');
  const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
  menuBtn.addEventListener('click', () => mobileMenu.classList.toggle('hidden'));
  function closeMobile(){ mobileMenu.classList.add('hidden'); }

  /* ── Scroll reveal ──────────── */
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('visible'); } });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

  /* ── Program tabs ───────────── */
  function switchTab(n) {
    ['panel1','panel2'].forEach((id, i) => {
      document.getElementById(id).classList.toggle('hidden', i+1 !== n);
    });
    ['tab1','tab2'].forEach((id, i) => {
      const el = document.getElementById(id);
      if(i+1 === n){
        el.classList.add('active');
        el.classList.remove('bg-white','text-slate-600','border-slate-200');
      } else {
        el.classList.remove('active');
        el.classList.add('bg-white','text-slate-600','border-slate-200');
      }
    });
  }

  /* ── Send via WhatsApp ──────── */
  function sendMessage() {
    const name    = document.getElementById('f-name').value.trim();
    const contact = document.getElementById('f-contact').value.trim();
    const message = document.getElementById('f-message').value.trim();
    if(!name || !message){
      alert('Mohon isi nama dan pesan terlebih dahulu 😊');
      return;
    }
    const text = encodeURIComponent(
      `Halo Mindy! 👋\n\nNama: ${name}\nKontak: ${contact || '(tidak diisi)'}\n\nPesan:\n${message}\n\n(Dikirim dari website AwareMind Indonesia)`
    );
    window.open(`https://wa.me/6285183192069?text=${text}`, '_blank');
  }

  /* ── Stagger hero animation ─── */
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    const hero = document.querySelector('#hero .text-center, #hero .md\\:text-left');
    if(hero){
      hero.querySelectorAll('*').forEach((el, i) => {
        el.style.animationDelay = `${i * 0.05}s`;
      });
    }
  });
</script>

</body>
</html># profil-awaremind
